title: Homelab
description: Single-pane homelab observability — pod logs, host journald, edge nginx, security, cluster issues.

queries.query: SELECT count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "pods"

SELECT count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "pods" WHERE body LIKE '%error%' OR body LIKE '%ERROR%' OR body LIKE '%Error%' OR body LIKE '%panic%' OR body LIKE '%PANIC%' OR body LIKE '%FATAL%' OR body LIKE '%fatal%' OR body LIKE '%Exception%' OR body LIKE '%exception%' OR body LIKE '%Traceback%'
SELECT count(distinct k8s_pod_name) AS y_axis_1 FROM "pods"
SELECT count(distinct k8s_namespace_name) AS y_axis_1 FROM "pods"
SELECT histogram(_timestamp) AS x_axis_1, k8s_namespace_name AS breakdown_1, count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "pods" GROUP BY x_axis_1, breakdown_1 ORDER BY x_axis_1

SELECT _timestamp, k8s_namespace_name AS namespace, k8s_pod_name AS pod, body AS message FROM "pods" WHERE body LIKE '%error%' OR body LIKE '%ERROR%' OR body LIKE '%Error%' OR body LIKE '%panic%' OR body LIKE '%PANIC%' OR body LIKE '%FATAL%' OR body LIKE '%fatal%' OR body LIKE '%Exception%' OR body LIKE '%exception%' OR body LIKE '%Traceback%' ORDER BY _timestamp DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "pods" WHERE body LIKE '%error%' OR body LIKE '%ERROR%' OR body LIKE '%Error%' OR body LIKE '%panic%' OR body LIKE '%PANIC%' OR body LIKE '%FATAL%' OR body LIKE '%fatal%' OR body LIKE '%Exception%' OR body LIKE '%exception%' OR body LIKE '%Traceback%'

SELECT count(distinct k8s_pod_name) AS y_axis_1 FROM "pods" WHERE body LIKE '%error%' OR body LIKE '%ERROR%' OR body LIKE '%Error%' OR body LIKE '%panic%' OR body LIKE '%PANIC%' OR body LIKE '%FATAL%' OR body LIKE '%fatal%' OR body LIKE '%Exception%' OR body LIKE '%exception%' OR body LIKE '%Traceback%'

SELECT count(distinct k8s_namespace_name) AS y_axis_1 FROM "pods" WHERE body LIKE '%error%' OR body LIKE '%ERROR%' OR body LIKE '%Error%' OR body LIKE '%panic%' OR body LIKE '%PANIC%' OR body LIKE '%FATAL%' OR body LIKE '%fatal%' OR body LIKE '%Exception%' OR body LIKE '%exception%' OR body LIKE '%Traceback%'

SELECT count(*)/60 AS y_axis_1 FROM "pods" WHERE body LIKE '%error%' OR body LIKE '%ERROR%' OR body LIKE '%Error%' OR body LIKE '%panic%' OR body LIKE '%PANIC%' OR body LIKE '%FATAL%' OR body LIKE '%fatal%' OR body LIKE '%Exception%' OR body LIKE '%exception%' OR body LIKE '%Traceback%'

SELECT histogram(_timestamp) AS x_axis_1, k8s_namespace_name AS breakdown_1, count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "pods" WHERE body LIKE '%error%' OR body LIKE '%ERROR%' OR body LIKE '%Error%' OR body LIKE '%panic%' OR body LIKE '%PANIC%' OR body LIKE '%FATAL%' OR body LIKE '%fatal%' OR body LIKE '%Exception%' OR body LIKE '%exception%' OR body LIKE '%Traceback%' GROUP BY x_axis_1, breakdown_1 ORDER BY x_axis_1

SELECT _timestamp, k8s_namespace_name AS namespace, k8s_pod_name AS pod, k8s_container_name AS container, body AS message FROM "pods" WHERE body LIKE '%error%' OR body LIKE '%ERROR%' OR body LIKE '%Error%' OR body LIKE '%panic%' OR body LIKE '%PANIC%' OR body LIKE '%FATAL%' OR body LIKE '%fatal%' OR body LIKE '%Exception%' OR body LIKE '%exception%' OR body LIKE '%Traceback%' ORDER BY _timestamp DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Saved searches
panels.markdownContent:
## Quick search shortcuts

_Click a link below to open the OpenObserve search view with the query pre-populated. Default time range: 1h — adjust in the search UI._


### Error hunting
- [All errors (pods)](/web/logs?stream_type=logs&stream=pods&period=1h&sql_mode=true&%3D&org_identifier=default&refresh=0&show_histogram=true) — `pods`
- [Panics + fatals only](/web/logs?stream_type=logs&stream=pods&period=1h&sql_mode=true&query=U0VMRUNUICogRlJPTSAicG9kcyIgV0hFUkUgYm9keSBMSUtFICclcGFuaWM6JScgT1IgYm9keSBMSUtFICclRkFUQUwlJyBPUiBib2R5IExJS0UgJyVmYXRhbCUnIE9SREVSIEJZIF90aW1lc3RhbXAgREVTQw%3D%3D&org_identifier=default&refresh=0&show_histogram=true) — `pods`
- [Warnings](/web/logs?stream_type=logs&stream=pods&period=1h&sql_mode=true&query=U0VMRUNUICogRlJPTSAicG9kcyIgV0hFUkUgYm9keSBMSUtFICcld2FybiUnIE9SIGJvZHkgTElLRSAnJVdBUk4lJyBPUiBib2R5IExJS0UgJyVXYXJuaW5nJScgT1JERVIgQlkgX3RpbWVzdGFtcCBERVND&org_identifier=default&refresh=0&show_histogram=true) — `pods`
- [Exceptions / tracebacks](/web/logs?stream_type=logs&stream=pods&period=1h&sql_mode=true&query=U0VMRUNUICogRlJPTSAicG9kcyIgV0hFUkUgYm9keSBMSUtFICclRXhjZXB0aW9uJScgT1IgYm9keSBMSUtFICclZXhjZXB0aW9uJScgT1IgYm9keSBMSUtFICclVHJhY2ViYWNrJScgT1JERVIgQlkgX3RpbWVzdGFtcCBERVND&org_identifier=default&refresh=0&show_histogram=true) — `pods`

### Crashes / OOMs
- [OOMs](/web/logs?stream_type=logs&stream=pods&period=1h&sql_mode=true&query=U0VMRUNUICogRlJPTSAicG9kcyIgV0hFUkUgYm9keSBMSUtFICclT09NS2lsbGVkJScgT1IgYm9keSBMSUtFICclb3V0IG9mIG1lbW9yeSUnIE9SREVSIEJZIF90aW1lc3RhbXAgREVTQw%3D%3D&org_identifier=default&refresh=0&show_histogram=true) — `pods`
- [CrashLoopBackOff](/web/logs?stream_type=logs&stream=pods&period=1h&sql_mode=true&query=U0VMRUNUICogRlJPTSAicG9kcyIgV0hFUkUgYm9keSBMSUtFICclQ3Jhc2hMb29wQmFja09mZiUnIE9SIGJvZHkgTElLRSAnJUJhY2stb2ZmIHJlc3RhcnRpbmcgZmFpbGVkIGNvbnRhaW5lciUnIE9SREVSIEJZIF90aW1lc3RhbXAgREVTQw%3D%3D&org_identifier=default&refresh=0&show_histogram=true) — `pods`
- [Image-pull failures](/web/logs?stream_type=logs&stream=pods&period=1h&sql_mode=true&query=U0VMRUNUICogRlJPTSAicG9kcyIgV0hFUkUgYm9keSBMSUtFICclSW1hZ2VQdWxsQmFja09mZiUnIE9SIGJvZHkgTElLRSAnJUVyckltYWdlUHVsbCUnIE9SIGJvZHkgTElLRSAnJW1hbmlmZXN0IHVua25vd24lJyBPUiBib2R5IExJS0UgJyVGYWlsZWQgdG8gcHVsbCBpbWFnZSUnIE9SREVSIEJZIF90aW1lc3RhbXAgREVTQw%3D%3D&org_identifier=default&refresh=0&show_histogram=true) — `pods`

### Auth & security
- [SSH failures (headscale host)](/web/logs?stream_type=logs&stream=headscale_host&period=1h&sql_mode=true&query=U0VMRUNUICogRlJPTSAiaGVhZHNjYWxlX2hvc3QiIFdIRVJFIGJvZHkgTElLRSAnJUZhaWxlZCBwYXNzd29yZCUnIE9SIGJvZHkgTElLRSAnJUludmFsaWQgdXNlciUnIE9SREVSIEJZIF90aW1lc3RhbXAgREVTQw%3D%3D&org_identifier=default&refresh=0&show_histogram=true) — `headscale_host`
- [SSH failures (k3s host)](/web/logs?stream_type=logs&stream=k3s_host&period=1h&sql_mode=true&query=U0VMRUNUICogRlJPTSAiazNzX2hvc3QiIFdIRVJFIGJvZHkgTElLRSAnJUZhaWxlZCBwYXNzd29yZCUnIE9SIGJvZHkgTElLRSAnJUludmFsaWQgdXNlciUnIE9SREVSIEJZIF90aW1lc3RhbXAgREVTQw%3D%3D&org_identifier=default&refresh=0&show_histogram=true) — `k3s_host`
- [Headscale auth events](/web/logs?stream_type=logs&stream=headscale_host&period=1h&sql_mode=true&query=U0VMRUNUICogRlJPTSAiaGVhZHNjYWxlX2hvc3QiIFdIRVJFIHN5c3RlbWRfdW5pdCA9ICdoZWFkc2NhbGUuc2VydmljZScgT1JERVIgQlkgX3RpbWVzdGFtcCBERVND&org_identifier=default&refresh=0&show_histogram=true) — `headscale_host`
- [Nginx 5xx](/web/logs?stream_type=logs&stream=nginx_access&period=1h&sql_mode=true&query=U0VMRUNUICogRlJPTSAibmdpbnhfYWNjZXNzIiBXSEVSRSBib2R5IExJS0UgJyUiIDVfXyAlJyBPUkRFUiBCWSBfdGltZXN0YW1wIERFU0M%3D&org_identifier=default&refresh=0&show_histogram=true) — `nginx_access`
- [Nginx 4xx](/web/logs?stream_type=logs&stream=nginx_access&period=1h&sql_mode=true&query=U0VMRUNUICogRlJPTSAibmdpbnhfYWNjZXNzIiBXSEVSRSBib2R5IExJS0UgJyUiIDRfXyAlJyBPUkRFUiBCWSBfdGltZXN0YW1wIERFU0M%3D&org_identifier=default&refresh=0&show_histogram=true) — `nginx_access`

### Host / infra
- [K3s systemd journal](/web/logs?stream_type=logs&stream=k3s_host&period=1h&sql_mode=true&query=U0VMRUNUICogRlJPTSAiazNzX2hvc3QiIE9SREVSIEJZIF90aW1lc3RhbXAgREVTQw%3D%3D&org_identifier=default&refresh=0&show_histogram=true) — `k3s_host`
- [K3s unit failures](/web/logs?stream_type=logs&stream=k3s_host&period=1h&sql_mode=true&query=U0VMRUNUICogRlJPTSAiazNzX2hvc3QiIFdIRVJFIGJvZHkgTElLRSAnJUZhaWxlZCUnIE9SIGJvZHkgTElLRSAnJWZhaWxlZCB3aXRoIGV4aXQgY29kZSUnIE9SREVSIEJZIF90aW1lc3RhbXAgREVTQw%3D%3D&org_identifier=default&refresh=0&show_histogram=true) — `k3s_host`
- [Headscale journald](/web/logs?stream_type=logs&stream=headscale_host&period=1h&sql_mode=true&query=U0VMRUNUICogRlJPTSAiaGVhZHNjYWxlX2hvc3QiIE9SREVSIEJZIF90aW1lc3RhbXAgREVTQw%3D%3D&org_identifier=default&refresh=0&show_histogram=true) — `headscale_host`
- [Nginx access (all)](/web/logs?stream_type=logs&stream=nginx_access&period=1h&sql_mode=true&query=U0VMRUNUICogRlJPTSAibmdpbnhfYWNjZXNzIiBPUkRFUiBCWSBfdGltZXN0YW1wIERFU0M%3D&org_identifier=default&refresh=0&show_histogram=true) — `nginx_access`
- [Nginx errors (all)](/web/logs?stream_type=logs&stream=nginx_error&period=1h&sql_mode=true&query=U0VMRUNUICogRlJPTSAibmdpbnhfZXJyb3IiIE9SREVSIEJZIF90aW1lc3RhbXAgREVTQw%3D%3D&org_identifier=default&refresh=0&show_histogram=true) — `nginx_error`

### Noise analysis
- [Top noisy pods](/web/logs?stream_type=logs&stream=pods&period=1h&sql_mode=true&query=U0VMRUNUIGs4c19uYW1lc3BhY2VfbmFtZSBBUyBuYW1lc3BhY2UsIGs4c19wb2RfbmFtZSBBUyBwb2QsIGNvdW50KCopIEFTIHJlY29yZHMgRlJPTSAicG9kcyIgR1JPVVAgQlkgbmFtZXNwYWNlLCBwb2QgT1JERVIgQlkgcmVjb3JkcyBERVNDIExJTUlUIDUw&org_identifier=default&refresh=0&show_histogram=true) — `pods`
- [Volume by namespace](/web/logs?stream_type=logs&stream=pods&period=1h&sql_mode=true&query=U0VMRUNUIGs4c19uYW1lc3BhY2VfbmFtZSBBUyBuYW1lc3BhY2UsIGNvdW50KCopIEFTIHJlY29yZHMgRlJPTSAicG9kcyIgR1JPVVAgQlkgbmFtZXNwYWNlIE9SREVSIEJZIHJlY29yZHMgREVTQw%3D%3D&org_identifier=default&refresh=0&show_histogram=true) — `pods`
- [Volume by container](/web/logs?stream_type=logs&stream=pods&period=1h&sql_mode=true&query=U0VMRUNUIGs4c19uYW1lc3BhY2VfbmFtZSBBUyBuYW1lc3BhY2UsIGs4c19jb250YWluZXJfbmFtZSBBUyBjb250YWluZXIsIGNvdW50KCopIEFTIHJlY29yZHMgRlJPTSAicG9kcyIgR1JPVVAgQlkgbmFtZXNwYWNlLCBjb250YWluZXIgT1JERVIgQlkgcmVjb3JkcyBERVNDIExJTUlUIDUw&org_identifier=default&refresh=0&show_histogram=true) — `pods`

queries.query: SELECT count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "pods"
SELECT count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "pods" WHERE body LIKE '%panic:%' OR body LIKE '%OOMKilled%' OR body LIKE '%CrashLoopBackOff%' OR body LIKE '%segmentation fault%' OR body LIKE '%runtime error%'
SELECT count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "pods" WHERE body LIKE '%ImagePullBackOff%' OR body LIKE '%ErrImagePull%' OR body LIKE '%manifest unknown%' OR body LIKE '%Failed to pull image%'
SELECT count(distinct k8s_pod_name) AS y_axis_1 FROM "pods" WHERE k8s_container_restart_count > 0
SELECT histogram(_timestamp) AS x_axis_1, k8s_namespace_name AS breakdown_1, count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "pods" GROUP BY x_axis_1, breakdown_1 ORDER BY x_axis_1

SELECT k8s_namespace_name AS namespace, k8s_pod_name AS pod, count(*) AS errors FROM "pods" WHERE body LIKE '%error%' OR body LIKE '%ERROR%' OR body LIKE '%Error%' OR body LIKE '%panic%' OR body LIKE '%PANIC%' OR body LIKE '%FATAL%' OR body LIKE '%fatal%' OR body LIKE '%Exception%' OR body LIKE '%exception%' OR body LIKE '%Traceback%' GROUP BY namespace, pod ORDER BY errors DESC LIMIT 25

SELECT k8s_namespace_name AS namespace, k8s_container_name AS container, count(*) AS errors FROM "pods" WHERE body LIKE '%error%' OR body LIKE '%ERROR%' OR body LIKE '%Error%' OR body LIKE '%panic%' OR body LIKE '%PANIC%' OR body LIKE '%FATAL%' OR body LIKE '%fatal%' OR body LIKE '%Exception%' OR body LIKE '%exception%' OR body LIKE '%Traceback%' GROUP BY namespace, container ORDER BY errors DESC LIMIT 25
SELECT count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "k3s_host"
SELECT count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "k3s_host" WHERE body LIKE '%Failed%' OR body LIKE '%failed with exit code%'
SELECT count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "k3s_host" WHERE systemd_unit = 'sshd.service'
SELECT histogram(_timestamp) AS x_axis_1, systemd_unit AS breakdown_1, count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "k3s_host" GROUP BY x_axis_1, breakdown_1 ORDER BY x_axis_1
SELECT systemd_unit AS unit, count(*) AS signals FROM "k3s_host" WHERE body LIKE '%Failed%' OR body LIKE '%failed with exit code%' GROUP BY unit ORDER BY signals DESC LIMIT 25
SELECT count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "nginx_access"
SELECT count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "nginx_error"
SELECT count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "headscale_host" WHERE body LIKE '%Failed password%' OR body LIKE '%Invalid user%'
SELECT count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "headscale_host" WHERE systemd_unit = 'headscale.service' AND (body LIKE '%auth%' OR body LIKE '%registration%' OR body LIKE '%logout%')
SELECT histogram(_timestamp) AS x_axis_1, count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "nginx_access" GROUP BY x_axis_1 ORDER BY x_axis_1

SELECT
            CASE
              WHEN body LIKE '% 2__ %' OR body LIKE '%" 2__ %' THEN '2xx'
              WHEN body LIKE '% 3__ %' OR body LIKE '%" 3__ %' THEN '3xx'
              WHEN body LIKE '% 4__ %' OR body LIKE '%" 4__ %' THEN '4xx'
              WHEN body LIKE '% 5__ %' OR body LIKE '%" 5__ %' THEN '5xx'
              ELSE 'other'
            END AS status_class,
            count(*) AS requests
          FROM "nginx_access" GROUP BY status_class ORDER BY requests DESC

SELECT _timestamp, body AS message
          FROM "headscale_host"
          WHERE systemd_unit = 'headscale.service'
            AND (body LIKE '%auth%' OR body LIKE '%registration%' OR body LIKE '%login%' OR body LIKE '%logout%')
          ORDER BY _timestamp DESC LIMIT 25

SELECT count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "headscale_host"
           WHERE body LIKE '%Failed password%' OR body LIKE '%Invalid user%' OR body LIKE '%authentication failure%'
SELECT count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "nginx_access" WHERE body LIKE '%" 4__ %'
SELECT count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "nginx_access" WHERE body LIKE '%" 5__ %'
SELECT count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "headscale_host" WHERE systemd_unit = 'headscale.service'

SELECT histogram(_timestamp) AS x_axis_1, count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "headscale_host"
           WHERE body LIKE '%Failed password%' OR body LIKE '%Invalid user%'
           GROUP BY x_axis_1 ORDER BY x_axis_1

SELECT SPLIT_PART(body, ' ', 1) AS client_ip, count(*) AS bad_requests
           FROM "nginx_access"
           WHERE body LIKE '%" 4__ %' OR body LIKE '%" 5__ %'
           GROUP BY client_ip ORDER BY bad_requests DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT _timestamp, systemd_unit AS unit, body AS message
           FROM "headscale_host"
           WHERE body LIKE '%Failed password%' OR body LIKE '%Invalid user%'
              OR body LIKE '%authentication failure%' OR body LIKE '%Accepted%'
              OR (systemd_unit = 'headscale.service' AND body LIKE '%auth%')
           ORDER BY _timestamp DESC LIMIT 30
SELECT count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "pods" WHERE body LIKE '%panic:%' OR body LIKE '%goroutine %' OR body LIKE '%runtime error%'
SELECT count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "pods" WHERE body LIKE '%OOMKilled%' OR body LIKE '%out of memory%'
SELECT count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "pods" WHERE body LIKE '%CrashLoopBackOff%' OR body LIKE '%Back-off restarting failed container%'
SELECT count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "pods" WHERE body LIKE '%ImagePullBackOff%' OR body LIKE '%ErrImagePull%' OR body LIKE '%manifest unknown%' OR body LIKE '%Failed to pull image%'

SELECT histogram(_timestamp) AS x_axis_1, k8s_namespace_name AS breakdown_1, count(*) AS y_axis_1
            FROM "pods" WHERE (body LIKE '%panic:%' OR body LIKE '%goroutine %' OR body LIKE '%runtime error%') OR (body LIKE '%OOMKilled%' OR body LIKE '%out of memory%') OR (body LIKE '%CrashLoopBackOff%' OR body LIKE '%Back-off restarting failed container%') OR (body LIKE '%ImagePullBackOff%' OR body LIKE '%ErrImagePull%' OR body LIKE '%manifest unknown%' OR body LIKE '%Failed to pull image%')
            GROUP BY x_axis_1, breakdown_1 ORDER BY x_axis_1

SELECT _timestamp, k8s_namespace_name AS namespace, k8s_pod_name AS pod, body AS message
            FROM "pods" WHERE (body LIKE '%panic:%' OR body LIKE '%goroutine %' OR body LIKE '%runtime error%') OR (body LIKE '%OOMKilled%' OR body LIKE '%out of memory%') OR (body LIKE '%CrashLoopBackOff%' OR body LIKE '%Back-off restarting failed container%') OR (body LIKE '%ImagePullBackOff%' OR body LIKE '%ErrImagePull%' OR body LIKE '%manifest unknown%' OR body LIKE '%Failed to pull image%')
            ORDER BY _timestamp DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "pods"
SELECT count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "k3s_host"
SELECT count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "headscale_host"
SELECT count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "nginx_access"
SELECT count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "nginx_error"
SELECT histogram(_timestamp) AS x_axis_1, count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "pods" GROUP BY x_axis_1 ORDER BY x_axis_1
SELECT histogram(_timestamp) AS x_axis_1, count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "k3s_host" GROUP BY x_axis_1 ORDER BY x_axis_1
SELECT histogram(_timestamp) AS x_axis_1, count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "headscale_host" GROUP BY x_axis_1 ORDER BY x_axis_1
SELECT histogram(_timestamp) AS x_axis_1, count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "nginx_access" GROUP BY x_axis_1 ORDER BY x_axis_1
SELECT histogram(_timestamp) AS x_axis_1, count(*) AS y_axis_1 FROM "nginx_error" GROUP BY x_axis_1 ORDER BY x_axis_1
